description_long: This is a modern outdoor bench featuring a seat and backrest made from evenly spaced horizontal wooden slats. The bench is supported by a sturdy black metal frame, with two armrests on either side that curve gently for ergonomic comfort. The legs are minimalistic, consisting of two central metal supports that anchor the bench to the ground, providing stability while maintaining an open, airy appearance. The wood has a natural finish, highlighting its grain and giving the bench a warm, inviting look suitable for parks or urban sidewalks. The overall design is both functional and aesthetically pleasing, blending durability with contemporary style. The bench is designed to comfortably seat multiple people and is built to withstand outdoor conditions.
description: A contemporary wooden slat bench with black metal frame and armrests, designed for outdoor use. Features a backrest and central metal supports for stability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bench, wooden slats, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved seat and backrest, as well as the central metal support and armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backrest slats and the two central metal supports anchoring the bench.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the curvature and structure of the bench.
